lessons.rule: 100% mid convergence at 60s does NOT guarantee positive capture_ratio; monitor theoretical_settled vs realized_profit as primary dep-arb health metric

verifier_approved_settled=0 with vetoes_costing_edge verdict implies either: (1) verifier is over-conservative (test by disabling gate) or (2) approved trades never reach settlement (investigate ledger flow)
all directional context buckets show n=1; defer avoid_contexts until n>=10 per bucket to prevent spurious inference from noise
5461 MC adverse-selection rejections vs 65 executions (84:1 ratio) suggests maker-checker is primary filter; investigate if it blocks systematically profitable setups or protects from bleed

Verifier vetoes cost edge (vetoed trades would've lost $754) but settled capture_ratio=-0.654 suggests hold-to-resolution bleed dominates; verifier may be blocking bad entries that still win at mid_exit
Mid_convergence 60s shows 100% converged_rate but n=1; need ≥30 samples before trusting mid_exit_horizon_s=60 as stable
mc_adverse_selection rejected 5466 vs entry_vwap_below_floor 1568; adverse selection is dominant kill—clock_skew and tighter max_entry_vwap may reduce it
capture_ratio=-0.63 (realized=-$9, theoretical=+$14) means hold-to-resolution loses 165% of edge; mid_exit mandatory
vetoed trades would win 53% (vs 52% approved) and lose -$755 (vs -$15 approved); verifier gate is net-harmful
mid_convergence_by_horizon 30s/60s/120s all 100% converged but n=3 each; promising but statistically void until n>=50
intel.verifier_approved_settled n=0 means no maker-checker validation data exists; cannot assess Claude settle-time quality
60s mid_exit achieves 100% convergence but capture_ratio=-0.74; convergence != profitability—test shorter horizons (30s) to reduce hold bleed
verifier_veto_quality verdict=vetoes_costing_edge (n=108, vetoed-would-win=52.8%, vetoed-would-pnl=-$754.60) means veto logic anti-correlates with edge; disable verifier gate
green_path entry mode 0% win-rate (n=4, pnl=-$24) vs standard 50% (n=2, pnl=+$5.59); avoid green_path until re-tuned
spread_bucket <=0.01 lost 0% (n=2, -$19) vs 0.03-0.06 won 33% (n=3, +$5.59); tight spreads signal adverse-selection not liquidity edge
When mid_convergence_by_horizon shows 100% convergence but capture_ratio is deeply negative, mid_exit timing is misaligned with actual P&L crystallization—investigate exit trigger vs settle logic
1645 below_floor vs 3 above_cap rejections indicates VWAP bounds are asymmetrically calibrated; tighten max_entry_vwap when floor rejections dominate by >100x

When verifier_veto_quality shows vetoes_costing_edge but vetoed_would_have_pnl is large negative, verifier correctly identifies bad trades but system has no positive-edge baseline; disable verifier gate until base strategy profitable
When all confidence_tier buckets demote to C (losing_or_subcoinflip) and overall WR=52.2% with PF=0.87, there is no directional edge in any measured regime; halt directional trading
60s mid_exit shows 100% convergence (8/8) yet capture_ratio -0.63 vs theoretical +$14.92 — hold-to-resolution dominates; shorten horizon to 30s
6/6 settled contexts tier-C (trending, insufficient_data, zscore 1..2/-1..1, ttc>=240s, edge medium/high) all losing; no exploitable signal detected
55.9% capture ratio bleeds $16.43→-$9.18; hold-to-resolution destroys theoretical edge despite convergence
111 vetoes with 53.2% would-win/-$753 PnL = maker-checker anti-correlated with settle outcome; disable until n≥500
0% WR (0/5) and -$29 on green_path vs 75% WR/+$23 standard; block green_path until root-caused
20% WR/-$13.41 on n=5 in insufficient_data regime vs 50% WR/+$7.56 trending; gate out when no hurst signal
when mid_convergence_by_horizon[60s].converged_rate==1.0 AND verifier_veto_quality.vetoed_would_have_win_rate>0.50 AND capture_ratio<0 then verifier gate adds no edge, disable
regime:insufficient_data loses (n=5, WR=20%, -$13.41), reject candidates when hurst calculation fails
theoretical_settled_usd=$16.51 vs realized=-$9.89 implies 160% value decay holding to resolution; prioritize mid_exit over settle
verifier vetoes costing $-754 but approved_settled n=0; cannot validate maker-checker value without non-zero approved sample
edge_quality:high bucket shows 0.375 win_rate, -$0.84; medium shows 0.0 win_rate, -$5.00; model calibration may be inverting signal or slippage dominates
verifier_veto_quality=vetoes_costing_edge (vetoed trades would win 51.75% but lose $-757); veto logic is anti-correlated with edge—disable or rebuild verifier
only 7 dep_arb_verifier_veto rejections but capture_ratio=-0.74 on 84 settled; main bleed is booking/slippage, not veto—investigate entry_vwap vs theoretical settle
Verifier vetoes (n=128) show would-have WR=54.7% but -$750 PnL, indicating veto logic is anti-edge; disable PULSE_DEP_ARB_VERIFIER_REQUIRE_VERDICT
Excluding dep-arb: n=9, WR=33%, PnL=-$5.84 — insufficient sample to differentiate from noise
edge_quality:high lost -$0.84 at 37.5% WR (n=8); edge_quality:medium lost -$5 at 0% WR (n=1) — model anti-calibrated
nested_execute bleeds 174% of theoretical edge (-$12.76 vs +$17.10) holding to resolution despite perfect 60s convergence — exit mid-convergence mandatory
Claude verifier vetoes 115 trades that would win 51.3% for -$757 PnL (vetoes_costing_edge) — verifier anti-correlated with settle outcomes, disable gate requirement
5692 mc_adverse_selection rejects dominate dep-arb flow (73% of 7374 total rejects) — market-making adverse selection detector is primary blocker, not verifier or spread
all hurst/zscore/ttc/edge_quality buckets show <=53% win rate and negative PnL — no directional exploit context exists in 72-sample paper regime
verifier_veto_quality shows vetoes_costing_edge (51.3% WR on rejected, -$757 bleed) but approved_settled n=0 means no maker-checker grading at settle; disable gate until live validation
edge_quality:high (n=8, 37.5% WR, -$0.84) and edge_quality:medium (n=1, 0% WR, -$5) both losing sub-coinflip; no evidence of edge in reported quality tiers
hurst_regime:insufficient_data (n=5, 20% WR, -$13.41, brier=0.356) is worst-performing regime; avoid until hurst signal stabilizes

1674 dep-arb rejected for entry_vwap_below_floor vs 3 above_cap; asymmetric floor tightness or adverse-selection filter too aggressive; test PULSE_DEPENDENCY_ARB_CLOCK_SKEW_ENABLED=1 to adjust entry timing
verifier vetoes cost edge (n=115, vetoed-would-win=51.3%, vetoed-would-pnl=-$757); disable PULSE_DEP_ARB_VERIFIER_REQUIRE_VERDICT
60s mid_exit shows 100% convergence but capture_ratio=-0.75 vs theoretical=$17.10; convergence != realized profit, shorten horizon to 30s
ttc_bucket>=240s bleeds at 33.3% WR, -$5.84 PnL (n=9); block directional entries with ttc>=240s
hurst_regime=insufficient_data shows 20% WR, -$13.41 PnL (n=5); block or gate on regime confidence
edge_quality:high shows 37.5% WR, -$0.84 PnL (n=8); edge_quality:medium 0% WR, -$5 PnL (n=1); directional edge model miscalibrated, do not trust edge_quality buckets

60s mid-exit shows 100% convergence (52/52) but capture_ratio -0.75 → hold-to-resolution bleeds $29.86 vs theoretical; deterministic mid-observer working but entry pricing or adverse selection dominates

verifier vetoed 115 trades that would have lost -$757 at 51.3% win-rate → vetoes are edge-protective, not edge-costing; verdict label 'vetoes_costing_edge' is misleading given negative counterfactual PnL
mc_adverse_selection rejected 9141 candidates vs 145 settled; maker-checker logic may be over-filtering or parent book quality is poor; log parent book spread/depth at mc_adverse_selection rejection
72 settled directional at 52.8% win-rate, -$2.72 PnL, profit_factor 0.98 → no post-cost edge; calibration Brier 0.264 vs baseline 0.25 shows model adds no information
green_path 0% win-rate (0/5), -$29 PnL vs standard 75% (3/4), +$23.16 → green_path entry timing or pricing severely broken; kill immediately
100% mid-convergence at 60s does NOT guarantee positive capture_ratio; hold-to-resolution bleed or adverse selection can dominate LCMM edge
dep_arb verifier vetoes (n=116) actively cost edge (vetoed-would-pnl=-$757); Claude maker-checker adding noise not signal at 5-min horizon
hurst_regime=insufficient_data: 20% win-rate, -$13.41 PnL (n=5); missing microstructure state = adverse selection dominant
edge_quality:high bucket underperforms (37.5% win, -$0.84, n=8); model's high-conviction signals are false positives in 5-min BTC chop
60s mid_exit_horizon allows 100% convergence but maximizes hold-to-resolution slippage; 30s horizon (94.6% converged) likely optimal risk/reward
Vetoed proposals n=118 would lose -$755 at 52.5% win rate; verifier is correctly filtering adverse selection despite 'vetoes_costing_edge' label—headline is misleading
All settled buckets (n=9 max) either lose or show <0.53 win rate; no hurst/zscore/ttc/edge_quality bucket clears 60%+ win rate or +$10 PnL threshold for exploitation
nested_execute=true but no A/B comparison vs conjunction-only; cannot attribute -$11 loss to nested logic vs other factors (max_entry_vwap=0.85, mid_exit_horizon=60s)
Perfect 60s mid-convergence (100%) does NOT imply capture; -59% ratio shows hold-to-resolution destroys theoretical edge
Dep-arb verifier vetoes 119 trades with 53% win rate but -$755 PnL (vetoes_costing_edge); gate may be anti-correlated with profit
Hurst regime=insufficient_data loses -$13.41 at 20% win rate across 5 trades; avoid when regime classifier uncertain
Edge_quality:high bucket (n=8) wins only 38% losing -$0.84; high-conviction model may be overfit or inverted
Time-to-close >=240s bucket loses -$5.84 at 33% win (n=9); long exposure windows amplify directional noise
100% mid-convergence at 60s does NOT guarantee profit; -58.6% capture ratio proves hold-to-resolution bleed dominates realized PnL in 5-min BTC
verifier vetoes show 52.9% would-win rate yet -$755 would-PnL, confirming vetoes cannot rescue strategy from systemic bleed; gating logic is net-harmful
52.78% win rate, -$2.72 PnL, profit factor 0.98 across all contexts (regime/zscore/ttc/edge_quality/markov) proves no exploitable directional signal in 5-min BTC
60s mid-convergence 100% does NOT imply profitable booking: -0.57 capture vs +$18 theoretical means entry/exit execution bleeds 156% of edge; convergence != realized PnL

Maker-checker veto_quality verdict=vetoes_costing_edge (n=119, 53% would-win, -$754 vetoed PnL) indicates over-conservative filter; disabling gate isolates true adverse selection from false-positive vetoes
Verifier vetoes blocking profitable flow (53% win-rate vetoed proposals); intel.verifier_veto_quality='vetoes_costing_edge' signals disable PULSE_DEP_ARB_VERIFIER_REQUIRE_VERDICT when n>=100
Mid-exit @ 60s achieves 100% convergence but capture_ratio -0.57 vs theoretical; bleed suggests exit before full mean-reversion completes; extend horizon to 90-120s when converged_rate>=0.95

Directional 72 settled @ 53% win-rate, -$2.72 PnL, profit_factor 0.98 confirms no exploitable edge in 5-min BTC direction; avoid contexts: hurst_regime=insufficient_data, zscore_bucket=-1..1, ttc_bucket>=240s
If mid_convergence_60s=1.0 but capture_ratio<0, mid_exit exits before resolution recovers theoretical edge—disable mid_exit or extend horizon
vetoes_costing_edge verdict based on counterfactual 53% win-rate ignores that vetoed portfolio lost $754.91—verifier saved $754.91 vs. executing vetoed set
All edge_quality/regime/zscore/ttc buckets demoted to tier C (losing or subcoinflip); no statistically significant directional edge exists in 72-sample main report
60s converged_rate=1.0 does NOT imply profit; capture_ratio=-0.57 shows execution/hold bleed dominates gap decay
standard entry: 75% win, +$23.16 (n=4); green_path: 0% win, -$29.00 (n=5); green_path bleeding despite targeting better fills
nested_execute_enabled=true (LCMM dep-arb active); no conjunction-only baseline; cannot isolate nested vs conjunction effect from current data
Dep-arb verifier vetoes trades that would lose anyway (53% WR/-$754.91 on 119 vetoed); gate adds no value, remove or retrain
60s mid_exit horizon achieves 100% convergence (78/78) with 26.6% gap decay; 30s (96%) and 120s (91%) are inferior
Directional core (n=72) is 52.8% WR/-$2.72; only trending regime (n=4, 50% WR, +$7.56) breaks even, all other contexts lose
When capture_ratio<0 despite converged_rate>=0.95, investigate hold-to-resolution bleed vs mid-exit timing; -5.9% capture on $29 theoretical implies $1.72 execution drag per $29 edge
62.5% mid-convergence at 60s does NOT guarantee positive capture; -0.58 capture_ratio implies bleed dominates—exit must precede decay
Vetoed trades lost -$755 at 53% WR; 'vetoes_costing_edge' label is backwards—verifier blocks losing trades, not winners
Directional bot 52.8% WR, PF=0.98, -$2.72 PnL over 72 trades: no statistically significant edge; do not scale
nested_execute bypasses conjunction filtering and bleeds -158% of theoretical edge via adverse fills
verifier vetoes block -$754.91 loss exposure; zero approved settled trades confirm no exploitable signal remains
60s mid_exit shows 100% gap convergence but -58% capture ratio proves slippage/fees dominate any theoretical edge
52.78% WR on 72 settled is statistically indistinguishable from coin-flip; profit factor 0.98 confirms zero edge
mid_convergence_by_horizon n=0 at all horizons despite mid_exit_enabled=true → investigate mid-exit trigger logic or convergence tracker persistence
capture_ratio=-45% (realized -$8.63 vs theoretical $19.17) → entry slippage or adverse selection dominates; test clock_skew and lower max_entry_vwap
verifier vetoed 119 trades with 53% WR but -$754 PnL → vetoes are protective despite costing theoretical edge; keep gate enforced
76 settled at 52.6% WR, PF=1.03, Brier=0.27 → edge exists but barely above friction; exploit only tight-spread chop contexts
100% mid_convergence at 60s does NOT guarantee profitable capture; -43% booking ratio reveals entry VWAP or adverse selection dominates theoretical convergence edge
Verifier vetoes cost 52.9% win-rate BUT save -$755 PnL exposure; veto logic correctly identifies adverse risk profiles that mechanical features miss—keep enabled
spread_bucket <=0.01% yields 100% win-rate (2/2, +$16.88) in chop_noise markov_state; prioritize entries in ultra-tight spread + choppy liquidity windows
zscore_bucket -2..-1 is 0% win-rate (1 sample, -$5); avoid mean-reversion bets in strong directional zscore regimes until sample threshold met
100% convergence at 60s but -10% capture implies exit lags or adverse selection post-gap-close; shorten horizon or add momentum filter
Verifier vetoes 52% WR trades yet approved_settled=0; gate may be miscalibrated—test verifier_require_verdict=0
6828 mc_adverse_selection rejections dwarf 76 accepted; maker-checker is primary execution bottleneck, not spread/depth/EV gates

mid_exit_enabled=true but mid_convergence_by_horizon={30:n=0,60:n=0,120:n=0} means mid_observer is not scoring convergence—mid-exit is firing without convergence evidence; instrument mid_observer before re-enabling mid_exit

verifier_approved_settled=0 despite 102 settled means all dep-arb trades bypassed maker-checker; capture_ratio=-0.43 and theoretical_settled=$19.21 show $27.52 bleed from hold-to-resolution adverse-selection; require verifier approval gate

verifier_veto_quality verdict='vetoes_costing_edge' when vetoed_would_have_pnl=-$754.91 is a misnomer—vetoes prevented large loss; rename verdict to 'vetoes_preventing_loss' when vetoed_pnl<0 and win_rate≈0.5
76 settled, win_rate=52.6%, profit_factor=1.03, avg_loss($3.63)>avg_win($3.37) → no statistically significant edge; do not increase size or claim readiness until profit_factor>1.5 and n≥200
require mid_convergence n≥10 per horizon before trusting converged_rate for exit tuning
capture_ratio <-5% flags hold-to-settle structural leak; halt dep-arb if persists n≥50
wide_spread rejecting 62% of exec-costed (1006/1621) suggests orderbook illiquidity not edge erosion
nested_execute enabled but n=110 settled with -$0.65 PnL; conjunction-only comparison missing in experiments block, cannot isolate nested value without A/B split

100% mid-convergence at 60s does NOT imply positive capture; -8.7% capture_ratio vs +$23 theoretical shows deterministic mid-observer is correct but entry timing/VWAP is bleeding $25 in slippage/adverse selection
verifier_veto_quality shows vetoes_costing_edge verdict but vetoed trades would have lost $755 at 53% WR; verifier is correctly blocking bad entries, not removing profitable ones—do NOT disable gate
76 settled directional trades at 52.6% WR and 1.03 PF confirm near-zero edge in 5-min BTC direction; calibration error 0.075 is acceptable but model has no predictive power above base rate
capture_ratio=-7.4% vs theoretical=$23 on 100% mid-converged trades means exit execution or adverse post-convergence drift is destroying edge; prioritize booking diagnostics over convergence tuning

verifier_veto_quality='vetoes_costing_edge' but approved_settled=0 indicates gate never lifted a veto; either gate logic is broken or no trades passed verifier post-convergence—disable gate to isolate
nested_execute=true, conjunction implicitly off; if mid_exit fails, test PULSE_DEPENDENCY_ARB_CONJUNCTION=1 to validate whether nested-only path is masking booking bugs
60s mid_exit shows -7.4% capture vs theoretical; convergence!=profitability in efficient 5-min BTC
Vetoes block 53.7% WR trades; maker-checker costing $754 theoretical vs $0 approved settled; disable gate
0.6-0.7 bucket: 29 samples, 65.5% empirical_up; avoid 0.3-0.4 (38.9%) and 0.7-0.8 (50%)
Perfect 60s convergence but negative capture suggests execution timing lag; test clock_skew_enabled=1
0.7-0.8 predicted edge bucket empirical=50% (n=12) flags model overconfidence in strong-but-not-extreme signals; avoid or demand larger n before trusting
100% mid-convergence at 60s does NOT imply profitable capture; -7.4% capture_ratio vs theoretical shows execution bleed dominates convergence gains
vetoes_costing_edge verdict with vetoed-would-win=0.54 but vetoed-would-pnl=-$754 means verifier correctly blocks trades with slight win-rate edge but negative EV from costs
52.6% win rate on n=76 with PF=1.03 is within noise for 5-min BTC; avg_loss($3.63) > avg_win($3.37) shows no robust edge despite positive PnL
verifier vetoes (n=121) cost edge despite 54% hypothetical WR; maker-checker latency/friction likely causes -$754.50 bleed—test removal
60s mid-exit: 100% convergence but -7.4% capture ratio vs +$23.16 theoretical; convergence ≠ profitability—test shorter horizons or exit logic
7660 mc_adverse_selection rejections (84% of all dep-arb rejects) + wide entry_vwap (0.85) suggest conjunction flow is toxic pre-fill—tighten bounds
52.6% WR, 1.03 PF over 76 trades is near-random; 5-min BTC direction is efficient—do not scale or go live without robust dep-arb repair
If converged_rate@60s=100% but capture_ratio<0, mid-exit is systematically leaking to slippage—disable and hold to resolution
verdict='vetoes_costing_edge' with vetoed_pnl=-$754 means verifier is net-harmful despite protecting from -$1.71 realized; gate vetoes until fixed
1883 below_floor vs 3 above_cap rejects—adverse selection is entering at bad prices; tighten max_entry_vwap before re-enabling nested_execute
76 settled with 52.6% WR and PF=1.03 is within noise; do not adjust directional knobs until n>=500
60s mid-exit: 100% converged yet -16.7% capture → hold-to-resolution bleeds gains; test 30s horizon
verifier logged 122 vetoes costing edge but only 7 dep_arb_verifier_veto rejections → gating knob likely disabled
52.6% win-rate, PF=1.03 on 76 settled → no statistically significant directional edge at 5-min BTC
mid_exit_enabled=true w/ 60s horizon shows 100% convergence but capture_ratio=-0.18; exit timing erodes theoretical edge
verifier vetoes cost edge (vetoed WR=0.53) yet approved_settled=0; maker-checker blocking all flow despite vetoes_costing_edge verdict
76 settled, WR=52.6%, PF=1.03, Brier=0.27; no statistically significant directional edge vs near-efficient 5m BTC
mid_exit_enabled=true but convergence_by_horizon shows zero samples at all horizons; suspect mid-exit logic not triggering or mid_observer not recording; disable until instrumentation fixed
verifier_veto_quality verdict=vetoes_costing_edge is MISLEADING name; vetoed trades would have lost $757 at 53% win rate (worse than baseline 52.6%); verifier is correctly blocking adverse selection
capture_ratio=-17.8% on 120 settled means bleeding $28.21 from theoretical $23.94 to actual -$4.27; hold-to-resolution is destroying value; early exit or tighter entry_vwap needed
capture_ratio<-10% + theoretical>0 = hold-to-resolution kills edge; exit or kill
60s converged_rate=1.0 but 120s=0.0 on n=1 = need n>20 per horizon to trust
AVOID markov_state=stale_polymarket_down — confidently below breakeven (WR 0.2381 vs 0.4238, n 21, EV/trade -1.8998).

verifier veto verdict='vetoes_costing_edge' with vetoed-would-win=53.2% and vetoed-would-pnl=-$756.92 (n=124) indicates verifier is over-conservative; disable gate to test if adverse selection materializes without it
100% mid-convergence at 60s but -11.1% capture_ratio suggests entry slippage or adverse selection dominates—tighten max_entry_vwap
30s mid_exit showed 100% convergence with 0.242 avg_gap_decay vs 60s 0.112 decay (both n=6); faster exit captures more edge before market catches up
1885 rejections for entry_vwap_below_floor vs 7879 mc_adverse_selection suggests entry timing penalties; clock_skew_enabled=false may be missing skew-correction opportunity
edge_quality:high bucket shows n=2, win_rate=0.5, pnl=-$1.38; sample too small but currently in demotion_candidates, avoid until n>=30 with win_rate>55%
mid_exit_enabled=true but 0 samples at all horizons (30/60/120s)—check mid_observer logic or parent book staleness
verifier vetoes 54% WR proposals yet approved_settled n=0; gate destroys edge until live convergence proves mid-exit bleed cause
1885 rejections at floor vs 3 at cap—floor protective, cap (0.85) allows bleed; tighten cap before raising floor
Do not enable mid_exit_enabled without n≥30 in mid_convergence_by_horizon at target horizon; exiting on spread alone bleeds theoretical edge
When verifier_veto_quality shows vetoes_costing_edge + vetoed_would_have_win_rate>0.52, the Claude gate is overfitting to noise—downgrade to observe-only
nested_execute=true but no comparison data vs conjunction-only mode; cannot isolate nested logic impact on capture_ratio without A/B experiment
dep_arb_verifier_veto (n=7) coincides with verifier_veto_quality verdict=vetoes_costing_edge; vetoed pool shows 53.6% win/-$756, suggesting verifier blocks arb false-positively
edge_quality:high bucket 16.7% win/-$19.88 (n=6) in main strategy; model miscalibrated or edge_quality feature anti-predictive in 5-min BTC
zscore_bucket:-2..-1 shows 0% win/-$15 (n=3); extreme mean-reversion signals fail in 5-min, likely regime-conditional or stale
60s mid_exit convergence at 67% insufficient; hold-to-resolution may bleed less than -18.5% capture_ratio
mc_adverse_selection rejects 10,002 candidates vs 1,987 entry_vwap_below_floor—maker-checker filtering is primary quality gate, not entry price alone
wide_spread rejected 1019/1393 execution-gate rejects; tighten spread filter or avoid low-liquidity windows
Verifier vetoes 7 trades but vetoed-would-have lost -$756.68 at 53.6% win rate; veto logic is net-harmful
30s mid-exit horizon achieves 100% convergence vs 83% at 60s; prioritize faster exits to avoid hold-to-resolution bleed
Verifier vetoes saved $756 on 125 trades (54% would-win but negative EV); require verifier approval until live capture_ratio positive
Main strategy: 50% win-rate, 0.89 profit-factor, -$17 PnL on 84 settled—no statistical edge; do not increase exposure
theoretical_settled=$29.87 vs realized=-$3.64 (capture_ratio=-0.122) indicates 112% edge destruction; investigate timing leak or maker-taker asymmetry
60s mid_convergence converged_rate=58% is structural ceiling; 42% bleed-through to binary settle explains -18% capture vs +100% theoretical
verifier vetoes 125 trades claiming protection but vetoed-would-have-pnl=-$756 (wr=0.54) proves vetoes select against randomness not edge; disable gate
When theoretical_settled_usd is positive but realized_profit_usd is negative, reduce mid_exit_horizon_s by 15-25% to capture convergence before resolution bleed
if mid_convergence@60s >60% AND capture_ratio <-10%, mid-exit logic is misfiring (early exit into adverse fills)
if verifier_veto_quality.vetoed_would_have_win_rate >52% yet vetoed_would_have_pnl deeply negative, verifier is conflating edge with fill-quality; bypass until coherent
8740 MC adverse-selection rejects >> 7 verifier vetoes; MC gate is primary blocker, not verifier; investigate MC clock/book-state assumptions
Verifier vetoes 142 trades that would have won 52.8% (though still -$754 PnL); veto logic correlates with edge destruction—bypass verifier gate in next experiment
90 settled, WR=52.2%, PF=1.05, Brier=0.272 vs baseline=0.25; no exploitable edge shown, remain paper-only
72% convergence at 60s yet capture_ratio=-7.3%; gap_decay=0.15 insufficient to explain $27 theoretical→realized loss
all buckets tier B/C, n<10; 52% WR / PF=1.05 on 90 trades indistinguishable from noise in 5-min BTC
Core strategy 50.0% win rate, -$9.93 PnL on 112 settled; 5-min BTC direction is efficient
zscore_bucket:-1..1 (n=2, WR=50%, -$0.77) is only demotable context but sample size prohibits confident avoid; monitor at n≥10
verifier approved_settled=0 while veto_quality=vetoes_costing_edge indicates maker-checker is blocking ALL exits, not just bad ones; disable REQUIRE_VERDICT to isolate mid_exit performance
97 settled across 9 dims yields no A-tier contexts (all B/C); insufficient sample density to trust directional exploit contexts

verifier vetoes cost edge: 55% would-win, -$750 counterfactual; require_verdict gate harmful
mid_exit_enabled=true but mid_convergence_by_horizon all n=0; no mid-exits captured, suggests execution path broken
mid_exit_enabled=true but mid_convergence_by_horizon all n=0; mid-exit code path not firing, investigate nested_execute vs mid-exit branching logic
8740 MC adverse-selection rejects vs 125 verifier vetoes; MC gate clock/book assumptions are primary dep-arb blocker, not verifier quality
capture_ratio 12.8% means mid_exit closes 87% of theoretical; tighten horizon before disabling mid_exit
53.4% win-rate, PF 1.13, avg_loss≈avg_win on 103 settled: no edge to exploit by context
verifier vetoes cost edge when verdict=vetoes_costing_edge and vetoed_would_have_win_rate > 0.55; disable PULSE_DEP_ARB_VERIFIER_REQUIRE_VERDICT until verifier recalibrated

entry_vwap_below_floor (1959) vastly exceeds entry_vwap_above_cap (3); either floor is too high or VWAP execution consistently underperforms; test PULSE_DEPENDENCY_ARB_MAX_ENTRY_VWAP=0.90 to isolate cap vs floor issue
Verifier vetoes losing $749 on 56% win_rate proposals — correct risk mgmt, not edge loss
30s mid_exit: 100% converged, 16.6% decay vs 60s 20.4% — faster exit before bleed accelerates
AVOID confidence_tier=medium — confidently below breakeven (WR 0.3721 vs 0.516, n 43, EV/trade -1.3485).
